record.field: ot_from_worked_days = sum(line.amount for line in payslip.worked_days_line_ids if line.code == 'OVERTIME') ot_from_input = inputs['OT'].amount if inputs.get('OT') and inputs['OT'].amount > 0 else 0 result = ot_from_worked_days + ot_from_input

result = ( (inputs['TXBEN_CAR_QC'].amount if inputs.get('TXBEN_CAR_QC') else 0) + (inputs['TXBEN_GRP_INS_QC'].amount if inputs.get('TXBEN_GRP_INS_QC') else 0) + (inputs['TXBEN_HOUSING_QC'].amount if inputs.get('TXBEN_HOUSING_QC') else 0) + (inputs['TXBEN_OTHER_QC'].amount if inputs.get('TXBEN_OTHER_QC') else 0) )

result = ( result_rules.get('BASIC_QC', {}).get('total', 0) + result_rules.get('OT', {}).get('total', 0) + result_rules.get('STO', {}).get('total', 0) + result_rules.get('PTO', {}).get('total', 0) + result_rules.get('CTO', {}).get('total', 0) + (inputs['BONUS_QC'].amount if inputs.get('BONUS_QC') else 0) + (inputs['COMMISSION_QC'].amount if inputs.get('COMMISSION_QC') else 0) + (inputs['VAC_PAYOUT_QC'].amount if inputs.get('VAC_PAYOUT_QC') else 0) + result_rules.get('RETRO_QC', {}).get('total', 0) + result_rules.get('TERM_PAY_QC', {}).get('total', 0) + result_rules.get('SEVERANCE_QC', {}).get('total', 0) + result_rules.get('STAT_HOL_QC', {}).get('total', 0) + result_rules.get('TAXABLE_BENEFITS_QC', {}).get('total', 0) + result_rules.get('STOCK_OPT_QC', {}).get('total', 0) )

gross_amount = result_rules.get('GROSS_QC', {}).get('total', 0) if version.l10n_ca_qc_qpp_exempt: result = 0 else: pay_periods = version.l10n_ca_qc_pay_periods or 26 qpp_rate = payslip._rule_parameter('l10n_ca_qc_qpp_employee_rate') qpp_exemption = payslip._rule_parameter('l10n_ca_qc_qpp_basic_exemption') qpp_max = payslip._rule_parameter('l10n_ca_qc_qpp_max_contribution') period_exemption = qpp_exemption / pay_periods pensionable = max(gross_amount - period_exemption, 0) period_contribution = pensionable * qpp_rate # YTD accumulation — stop at annual maximum prior_slips = payslip.env['hr.payslip'].search([ ('employee_id', '=', payslip.employee_id.id), ('date_from', '>=', payslip.date_from.replace(month=1, day=1)), ('date_to', '<', payslip.date_from), ('state', 'in', ['done', 'paid']), ]) ytd = abs(sum( l.total for l in prior_slips.mapped('line_ids').filtered(lambda l: l.code == 'QPP_EE') )) remaining = max(qpp_max - ytd, 0) result = -min(period_contribution, remaining) if remaining > 0 else 0

gross_amount = result_rules.get('GROSS_QC', {}).get('total', 0) if version.l10n_ca_qc_qpp_exempt: result = 0 else: pay_periods = version.l10n_ca_qc_pay_periods or 26 qpp_ympe = payslip._rule_parameter('l10n_ca_qc_qpp_ympe') qpp2_rate = payslip._rule_parameter('l10n_ca_qc_qpp2_rate') qpp2_ceiling = payslip._rule_parameter('l10n_ca_qc_qpp2_ceiling') qpp2_max = payslip._rule_parameter('l10n_ca_qc_qpp2_max_contribution') period_ympe = qpp_ympe / pay_periods period_ceiling = qpp2_ceiling / pay_periods if gross_amount > period_ympe: qpp2_pensionable = min(gross_amount, period_ceiling) - period_ympe period_contribution = qpp2_pensionable * qpp2_rate # YTD accumulation prior_slips = payslip.env['hr.payslip'].search([ ('employee_id', '=', payslip.employee_id.id), ('date_from', '>=', payslip.date_from.replace(month=1, day=1)), ('date_to', '<', payslip.date_from), ('state', 'in', ['done', 'paid']), ]) ytd = abs(sum( l.total for l in prior_slips.mapped('line_ids').filtered(lambda l: l.code == 'QPP2_EE') )) remaining = max(qpp2_max - ytd, 0) result = -min(period_contribution, remaining) if remaining > 0 else 0 else: result = 0

gross_amount = result_rules.get('GROSS_QC', {}).get('total', 0) if version.l10n_ca_qc_qpip_exempt: result = 0 else: pay_periods = version.l10n_ca_qc_pay_periods or 26 qpip_rate = payslip._rule_parameter('l10n_ca_qc_qpip_employee_rate') qpip_max_insurable = payslip._rule_parameter('l10n_ca_qc_qpip_max_insurable') qpip_max_premium = payslip._rule_parameter('l10n_ca_qc_qpip_max_ee_premium') period_max_insurable = qpip_max_insurable / pay_periods insurable = min(gross_amount, period_max_insurable) period_premium = insurable * qpip_rate # YTD accumulation prior_slips = payslip.env['hr.payslip'].search([ ('employee_id', '=', payslip.employee_id.id), ('date_from', '>=', payslip.date_from.replace(month=1, day=1)), ('date_to', '<', payslip.date_from), ('state', 'in', ['done', 'paid']), ]) ytd = abs(sum( l.total for l in prior_slips.mapped('line_ids').filtered(lambda l: l.code == 'QPIP_EE') )) remaining = max(qpip_max_premium - ytd, 0) result = -min(period_premium, remaining) if remaining > 0 else 0

gross_amount = result_rules.get('GROSS_QC', {}).get('total', 0) if version.l10n_ca_qc_ei_exempt: result = 0 else: pay_periods = version.l10n_ca_qc_pay_periods or 26 ei_rate = payslip._rule_parameter('l10n_ca_qc_ei_employee_rate') ei_max_insurable = payslip._rule_parameter('l10n_ca_qc_ei_max_insurable') ei_max_premium = payslip._rule_parameter('l10n_ca_qc_ei_max_premium') period_max_insurable = ei_max_insurable / pay_periods insurable = min(gross_amount, period_max_insurable) period_premium = insurable * ei_rate # YTD accumulation prior_slips = payslip.env['hr.payslip'].search([ ('employee_id', '=', payslip.employee_id.id), ('date_from', '>=', payslip.date_from.replace(month=1, day=1)), ('date_to', '<', payslip.date_from), ('state', 'in', ['done', 'paid']), ]) ytd = abs(sum( l.total for l in prior_slips.mapped('line_ids').filtered(lambda l: l.code == 'EI_EE_QC') )) remaining = max(ei_max_premium - ytd, 0) result = -min(period_premium, remaining) if remaining > 0 else 0

gross_amount = result_rules.get('GROSS_QC', {}).get('total', 0) rrsp = abs(result_rules.get('RRSP_QC', {}).get('total', 0)) rpp = abs(result_rules.get('RPP_QC', {}).get('total', 0)) union = abs(result_rules.get('UNION_QC', {}).get('total', 0)) pay_periods = version.l10n_ca_qc_pay_periods or 26 taxable_per_period = gross_amount - rrsp - rpp - union annual_income = taxable_per_period * pay_periods
fed_brackets = [ (payslip._rule_parameter('l10n_ca_qc_fed_bracket_1'), payslip._rule_parameter('l10n_ca_qc_fed_rate_1')), (payslip._rule_parameter('l10n_ca_qc_fed_bracket_2'), payslip._rule_parameter('l10n_ca_qc_fed_rate_2')), (payslip._rule_parameter('l10n_ca_qc_fed_bracket_3'), payslip._rule_parameter('l10n_ca_qc_fed_rate_3')), (payslip._rule_parameter('l10n_ca_qc_fed_bracket_4'), payslip._rule_parameter('l10n_ca_qc_fed_rate_4')), (float('inf'), payslip._rule_parameter('l10n_ca_qc_fed_rate_5')), ]
bpa_max = payslip._rule_parameter('l10n_ca_qc_fed_basic_personal_amount') bpa_min = payslip._rule_parameter('l10n_ca_qc_fed_bpa_min') phase_out_start = payslip._rule_parameter('l10n_ca_qc_fed_bracket_3') phase_out_end = payslip._rule_parameter('l10n_ca_qc_fed_bracket_4')
if annual_income <= phase_out_start: fed_bpa = bpa_max elif annual_income >= phase_out_end: fed_bpa = bpa_min else: fed_bpa = bpa_max - (bpa_max - bpa_min) * (annual_income - phase_out_start) / (phase_out_end - phase_out_start)
tax = 0 prev_bracket = 0 for bracket, rate in fed_brackets: taxable_in_bracket = min(annual_income, bracket) - prev_bracket if taxable_in_bracket > 0: tax += taxable_in_bracket * rate prev_bracket = bracket if annual_income <= bracket: break
credit = fed_bpa * fed_brackets[0][1] annual_tax = max(tax - credit, 0)
# Quebec abatement: 16.5% reduction of federal tax annual_tax = annual_tax * 0.835
additional = version.l10n_ca_qc_additional_fed_tax or 0 result = -(annual_tax / pay_periods + additional)

gross_amount = result_rules.get('GROSS_QC', {}).get('total', 0) rrsp = abs(result_rules.get('RRSP_QC', {}).get('total', 0)) rpp = abs(result_rules.get('RPP_QC', {}).get('total', 0)) union = abs(result_rules.get('UNION_QC', {}).get('total', 0)) pay_periods = version.l10n_ca_qc_pay_periods or 26 taxable_per_period = gross_amount - rrsp - rpp - union annual_income = taxable_per_period * pay_periods
prov_brackets = [ (payslip._rule_parameter('l10n_ca_qc_prov_bracket_1'), payslip._rule_parameter('l10n_ca_qc_prov_rate_1')), (payslip._rule_parameter('l10n_ca_qc_prov_bracket_2'), payslip._rule_parameter('l10n_ca_qc_prov_rate_2')), (payslip._rule_parameter('l10n_ca_qc_prov_bracket_3'), payslip._rule_parameter('l10n_ca_qc_prov_rate_3')), (float('inf'), payslip._rule_parameter('l10n_ca_qc_prov_rate_4')), ]
tax = 0 prev_bracket = 0 for bracket, rate in prov_brackets: taxable_in_bracket = min(annual_income, bracket) - prev_bracket if taxable_in_bracket > 0: tax += taxable_in_bracket * rate prev_bracket = bracket if annual_income <= bracket: break
qc_bpa = payslip._rule_parameter('l10n_ca_qc_prov_basic_personal_amount') qc_credit = qc_bpa * prov_brackets[0][1] provincial_tax = max(tax - qc_credit, 0)
additional = version.l10n_ca_qc_additional_prov_tax or 0 result = -(provincial_tax / pay_periods + additional)
ref_date = payslip.date_from result = bool(payslip.employee_id.l10n_ca_qc_garnishment_ids.filtered( lambda g: g.active and g.start_date <= ref_date and (not g.end_date or g.end_date >= ref_date) ))

ref_date = payslip.date_from net_so_far = ( result_rules.get('GROSS_QC', {}).get('total', 0) + result_rules.get('RRSP_QC', {}).get('total', 0) + result_rules.get('RPP_QC', {}).get('total', 0) + result_rules.get('UNION_QC', {}).get('total', 0) + result_rules.get('QPP_EE', {}).get('total', 0) + result_rules.get('QPP2_EE', {}).get('total', 0) + result_rules.get('QPIP_EE', {}).get('total', 0) + result_rules.get('EI_EE_QC', {}).get('total', 0) + result_rules.get('FED_TAX_QC', {}).get('total', 0) + result_rules.get('PROV_TAX_QC', {}).get('total', 0) ) active_garnishments = payslip.employee_id.l10n_ca_qc_garnishment_ids.filtered( lambda g: g.active and g.start_date <= ref_date and (not g.end_date or g.end_date >= ref_date) ).sorted('priority') total_garnish = 0 for garnishment in active_garnishments: exempt = garnishment.exempt_amount or 0 disposable = max(net_so_far - exempt, 0) if garnishment.is_percentage: deduction = disposable * garnishment.percentage else: deduction = garnishment.amount deduction = min(deduction, disposable) total_garnish += deduction result = -total_garnish

result = ( result_rules.get('GROSS_QC', {}).get('total', 0) + result_rules.get('RRSP_QC', {}).get('total', 0) + result_rules.get('RPP_QC', {}).get('total', 0) + result_rules.get('UNION_QC', {}).get('total', 0) + result_rules.get('QPP_EE', {}).get('total', 0) + result_rules.get('QPP2_EE', {}).get('total', 0) + result_rules.get('QPIP_EE', {}).get('total', 0) + result_rules.get('EI_EE_QC', {}).get('total', 0) + result_rules.get('FED_TAX_QC', {}).get('total', 0) + result_rules.get('PROV_TAX_QC', {}).get('total', 0) + result_rules.get('GARNISH_QC', {}).get('total', 0) )

gross_amount = result_rules.get('GROSS_QC', {}).get('total', 0) if version.l10n_ca_qc_qpip_exempt: result = 0 else: pay_periods = version.l10n_ca_qc_pay_periods or 26 qpip_er_rate = payslip._rule_parameter('l10n_ca_qc_qpip_employer_rate') qpip_max_insurable = payslip._rule_parameter('l10n_ca_qc_qpip_max_insurable') qpip_max_er_premium = payslip._rule_parameter('l10n_ca_qc_qpip_max_er_premium') period_max_insurable = qpip_max_insurable / pay_periods period_max_er_premium = qpip_max_er_premium / pay_periods insurable = min(gross_amount, period_max_insurable) result = min(insurable * qpip_er_rate, period_max_er_premium)
gross_amount = result_rules.get('GROSS_QC', {}).get('total', 0) cnesst_rate = version.l10n_ca_qc_cnesst_rate or payslip._rule_parameter('l10n_ca_qc_cnesst_rate') result = gross_amount * cnesst_rate
HSF Employer Contribution (Fonds des services de santé)
gross_amount = result_rules.get('GROSS_QC', {}).get('total', 0) hsf_rate = payslip._rule_parameter('l10n_ca_qc_hsf_rate') result = gross_amount * hsf_rate
gross_amount = result_rules.get('GROSS_QC', {}).get('total', 0) cnt_rate = payslip._rule_parameter('l10n_ca_qc_cnt_rate') result = gross_amount * cnt_rate
